subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The Most Exalted Pen, from the loftiest Summit, calleth out with the most exalted call and saith: O servant of God, rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله ان القلم الاعلی من الذروة العلیا باعلی الندآء ینادی و یقول یا عبدالله افرح
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @proclamation to the people of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment
